timeline.evidence_ref: 7176.T/03_Events/Timely_Disclosures/20150127_東京証券取引所_TOKYO_PRO_Market_への上場のお知らせ__irnews20150127.pdf

industry.structure: Japan independent asset manager and ETF sponsor on TSE PRO Market; single filing segment (investment management and advisory). Competes with global ETF sponsors and domestic banks for listed products and institutional mandates.
industry.share_shift: Simplex gains share in Japan-first active and thematic ETFs per product pipeline, but global sponsors retain scale advantages in passive core products.
industry.trend: FY2026 success fees drove more than half of fee revenue; base fees grew with AUM (+2.9%) while performance fees surged (+53.6%). Regulatory attention on leveraged/inverse products remains a sector theme.
